headline: Tyler Technologies to Participate in May and June Investor Conferences
summary: PLANO, Texas, April 28, 2026--Tyler Technologies will participate in two investor conferences in May and June 2026.

headline: Citizens Reiterates Market Outperform on Tyler Technologies, Maintains $500 Price Target
summary: Citizens  analyst Trevor Walsh   reiterates Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) with a Market Outperform and maintains $500 price target.
